[[BLOCK:slide39_shape0]]
•   These variables are interrelated. Traditional Ordinary Least Squares Regression (OLS Regression) (普通最小二乘回归 (OLS Regression)) models assume the absence of Multi-collinearity (多重共线性 (Multi-collinearity)) (strong correlations among predictor variables); otherwise, the model becomes unstable. However, this does not affect Penalized Regression (惩罚回归 (Penalized Regression)).  
•   Total Cholesterol (总胆固醇)  
•   Low-Density Lipoprotein Cholesterol (LDL): "bad" cholesterol  
•   High-Density Lipoprotein Cholesterol (HDL): "good" cholesterol  
•   Triglycerides (TCH): Fats carried in the blood from the food we consume. Excess calories, alcohol, or sugar are converted into TCH and stored in fat cells.  
•   Low Triglycerides (LTG)
